dry_eye.description: Dry eye is poorly represented as a single EFO node; we use ontology proxies that overlap clinically (sicca, Sjögren, ocular surface).

trigeminal_pathway.description: Trigeminal nerve is anatomy; Open Targets indexes genes. We use gene-level proxies for sensory/neuro-lacrimal biology.
trigeminal_pathway.rationale: TRPV1 (nociception/inflammation), TRPM8 (cold/tear reflex), SCN9A (Nav1.7, sensory transmission), CHRM3 (lacrimal parasympathetic).
